headline: Morgan Stanley resets American Airlines stock price target amid jet fuel surge
summary: American Airlines stock has had a rough few years on Wall Street. Shares slid from the mid-$50s in 2018 to $18.15 at the time of writing. Now, one of the airline's longtime bulls has just given shareholders a reason to pay attention again. Morgan Stanley analyst Ravi Shanker refreshed ...

headline: Jersey Mike’s IPO Will Test Wall Street’s Appetite for Restaurant Stocks
summary: Jersey Mike’s has a large, mostly franchised system, more than 3,300 locations, and $4.2 billion in 2025 systemwide sales.

headline: Morgan Stanley Vs. JPMorgan: Which Big Bank Is the Better Buy This Year
summary: Morgan Stanley (NYSE:MS) and JPMorgan Chase (NYSE:JPM) both posted Q1 2026 results that showcased strength, yet the businesses behind those numbers look nothing alike. Morgan Stanley leaned on advisory fees and wealth flows. JPMorgan flexed a universal-bank engine touching cards, payments, and trading. Each firm’s core revenue engine now sits in a distinctly different part ... Morgan Stanley Vs. JPMorgan: Which Big Bank Is the Better Buy This Year
